svg.aria-label: Top panel shows desired and actual joint angle converging; bottom panel shows the error signal starting large, crossing zero at overshoot, and settling, with transient and steady-state regions labeled
svg.title: Top panel shows desired and actual joint angle converging; bottom panel shows the error signal starting large, crossing zero at overshoot, and settling, with transient and steady-state regions labeled
svg.text: Tracking error e(t) = q_d − q: transient then steady state
error starts large, may cross zero (overshoot), then settles
